options.name: -async_pins
options.description: Returns a collection of async preset or clear pins.

options.name: -cells
options.description: Creates a collection of cells. This is the default option

options.name: -clock
options.description: Specifies the name of a clock or a list of clocks

options.name: -clock_pins
options.description: Returns a collection of register clock pins. You can use other parameters to further filter this collection

options.name: -data_pins
options.description: Returns a collection of register data input pins. You can use other parameters to further filter this collection

options.name: -edge_triggered
options.description: Returns a collection of edge-triggered sequential instances

options.name: -fall_clock
options.description: Specifies the name of a clock or a list of clocks. The all_registers command creates a collection of registers opened by the falling edge of the clocks specified in the clock_list

options.name: -flops
options.description: Returns a collection of edge-triggered sequential instances. This option is provided for backward compatibility

options.name: -latches
options.description: Returns a collection of level sensitive sequential instances. This option is provided for backward compatibility.

options.name: -level_sensitive
options.description: Returns a collection of level-sensitive sequential instances.

options.name: -macros
options.description: Returns sequential instances that are neither flip-flops nor latches

options.name: -master_slave
options.description: Returns a collection of master-slave register cells.

options.name: -no_hierarchy
options.description: Searches the current instance only; does not descend the hierarchy

options.name: -output_pins
options.description: Returns a collection of register output pins.

options.name: -rise_clock
options.description: Specifies the name of a clock or a list of clocks. The all_registers command creates a collection of registers opened by the rising edge of the clocks specified in the clock_list

options.name: -slave_clock_pins
options.description: Returns a collection of slave clock pins of the master-slave registers. You can specify the slave clock pins asclocked_on_also in the library
